description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean white exterior walls and large glass windows at the front, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The ground floor includes a spacious entryway with sliding glass doors, a sheltered porch area, and a built-in bench. The interior layout is open, with visible partitioned rooms, wood and tile flooring, and contemporary furnishings. The roof is flat, consistent with modern urban homes, and the structure is supported by cylindrical columns at the front. Minimalist landscaping and subtle exterior detailing contribute to its sleek, urban appearance. The house is designed for single-family occupancy and integrates both functional and aesthetic elements typical of modern residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white walls, large front glass windows, and a minimalist urban design. Features include a sheltered porch, open interior layout, and contemporary finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass sliding doors, a sheltered porch with a built-in bench, and visible interior rooms.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal window openings, visible interior partitions, and cylindrical columns supporting the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with smaller windows and doors, highlighting the partitioned interior rooms and subtle wall decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large window, visible interior furnishings, and a secondary entrance or windowed area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows at the front, asymmetrical placement elsewhere
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large sliding glass doors, a sheltered porch with a built-in bench, and cylindrical support columns.
